introSection: Pacific Fruit Express is an E&F Miler Industries kiddie roller coaster located at Happy Hollow Park and Zoo in San Jose, California, USA.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 10 riders.

fullText:
Pacific Fruit Express is an E&F Miler Industries kiddie roller coaster located at Happy Hollow Park and Zoo in San Jose, California, USA.



Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 10 riders.
